description: Get a point at a ratio along a line. Useful for finding midpoints, medians, and other proportional positions on a line segment.
utility: Extract point at ratio along a line (midpoint, median)

arguments.name: shape
arguments.description: Line variable to extract point from

arguments.name: propertyName
arguments.description: Ratio property using type() expression. Ratio parameter goes inside type().

alternates.description: Get point at a ratio along the line. Ratio goes inside type().
